description: High-level programming language known for readability, extensive libraries, and backend development.
Interfacing with state-of-the-art LLMs, constructing system prompts, managing token window limits, and parsing responses.
Frameworks for building context-aware, reasoning applications and multi-agent workflows.
Building Retrieval-Augmented Generation workflows and configuring vector stores for long-term memory.
Exposing functions as tools for LLMs, designing REST APIs, handling error payloads, and integrating external APIs.
Modern frontend frameworks for building rich, interactive, and search-optimized user interfaces to control and monitor agents.
